data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Optimized route planning (minimize drive time)', but the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. While the use case mentions that the system optimizes daily routes, there are no specific details or data points provided to demonstrate that the optimization is effectively implemented or validated. This lack of concrete evidence leads to a gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No concrete API reads or persisted state checks confirming the optimization of route planning.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the optimization of route planning.
